news.headline: More employees managing expenses leading to rise of expense apps; Findity reports on expense management evolution across 10 markets in the latest report.
news.summary: In a recent report titled 'State of Expense Management Report 2025', Findity, a prominent expense management technology provider, analyzed the progression of expense management in ten global markets. The report includes analysis on Nordic countries such as Sweden, Norway, and Denmark. The findings present insights on trends and developments in expense management in various regions. This comprehensive report by Findity highlights the current state of expense management and provides valuable information on the industry's landscape.

Kanazawa University research uses high-speed imaging to study cell communication, pioneering nanoscopic profiling of sEVs.
news.summary: In Kanazawa, Japan, on April 3, 2025, the Nano Life Science Institute (WPI-NanoLSI) at Kanazawa University showcased a new method for examining small extracellular vesicles (sEVs) at a nanoscopic level. This cutting-edge technique involves utilizing high-speed atomic force microscopy (HS-AFM) videography to analyze the sEVs. This groundbreaking approach introduces an innovative way to study these microscopic structures.

news.headline: China vows necessary measures against Japan's chip export control
Kanazawa University researchers utilize extracellular vesicles to enhance immune response in cancer treatment.
news.summary: In Kanazawa, Japan on April 3, 2025, a breakthrough in cancer treatment was announced by researchers at the Nano Life Science Institute (WPI-NanoLSI) affiliated with Kanazawa University. They, along with their colleagues, have introduced a novel method utilizing extracellular vesicles (EVs), which are minuscule, naturally existing particles. This development marks a significant advancement in the field of cancer treatment.

news.headline: South Korea Acting President Han: US tariffs can be a big burden to the economy - Yonhap
Pan Pacific Singapore offers transformative spaces for gatherings in Marina Bay. Known for gracious hospitality.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Singapore's Marina Bay precinct and central business district, the prestigious Pan Pacific Singapore hotel stands out as a symbol of sophistication and excellent hospitality. It is a popular option for Meetings and Incentives due to its convenient location and exceptional service.

news.headline: Fangzhou's subsidiary, Fangyixing, designated as a 2024 National High-Tech Enterprise showing record growth.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Beijing Fangyixing Information Technology Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of China's top Internet healthcare solutions provider Fangzhou Inc. (06086.HK), received certification as a 2024 National High-Tech company. This underscores Fangzhou's commitment to innovation and advancing technological solutions in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Annual inflation in Turkey falls to 38.1% in March, shows Bloomberg data.
ECB's de Guindos: In terms of monetary policy, this uncertainty means we need to be extremely prudent when determining the appropriate stance.

Aker BP extends alliance with SLB and Stimwell Services for five more years to boost oil production.
news.summary: In Fornebu, Norway, on April 3, 2025, Aker BP announced an extension of their alliance agreement with SLB and Stimwell Services for an additional five years. The partnership aims to enhance oil production efficiency and output. This collaboration will see the entities working closely together to drive growth in the sector. Key individuals involved include Sami Haidar, Managing Director of Stimwell. This extended agreement underscores the commitment to achieving increased productivity in the oil industry.

news.headline: Wall Street analysts predict Lamb Weston Holdings Q3 earnings at 87 cents/share, higher than last year's $1.2/share. Quarterly revenue expected at $1.49 billion, up from $1.46 billion. Lamb Weston's stock gained 1.6% to close at $54.15.
news.summary: Eagle, Idaho-based company Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LW) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on April 3. Analysts forecast earnings of 87 cents per share, a decrease from $1.2 per share last year. Quarterly revenue is expected to be $1.49 billion, up from $1.46 billion in the previous year. On March 20, Lamb Weston declared a quarterly dividend of 37 cents per share. The company's stock closed at $54.15, up 1.6% on Wednesday. For more details and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

Warren Buffett avoids Bitcoin, but Berkshire Hathaway owns stake in Jefferies Financial Group, pitching BTC as inflation hedge. Berkshire holds 433,558 shares worth $34 million.
news.summary: Renowned investor Warren Buffett has decided against adding cryptocurrencies, such as Bitcoin, to Berkshire Hathaway Inc.'s portfolio. However, the firm indirectly holds exposure to the apex cryptocurrency through its investment in financial services company Jefferies Financial Group Inc. Berkshire Hathaway currently possesses 433,558 shares of Jefferies Financial Group Inc., valued at approximately $34 million, based on the most recent 13F filing. Jefferies, headquartered in New York City, is engaged in investment banking, capital markets, and asset management activities. Interestingly, Jefferies has a significant interest in iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF, which is the world's largest spot exchange-traded Bitcoin fund, as shown in SEC filings.

news.headline: Walker Lane Resources Ltd. reports attention-grabbing trade volume surge and progress on its fresh website.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.7%, up from the previous 5.2%. This increase has left a total of 1.5 million people without jobs, marking a significant rise from the previous 1.1 million. The government is said to be implementing measures to address this issue and provide support to those affected. Additionally, the GDP growth forecast for the year has been revised downward to 3.5%, down from the initial projection of 4.2%. This change comes as a result of various challenges faced by the economy, including supply chain disruptions and global market fluctuations. Experts are closely monitoring the situation and providing recommendations for a sustainable recovery.

news.headline: Trip.com Group increases childcare leave to 3 days, benefitting 10,000+ employees globally, part of broader support for parents.
news.summary: Trip.com Group has recently revealed plans to offer three extra childcare leave days to parents of children under 18 years old in Singapore. This initiative is part of a larger effort to aid working parents, which also includes childcare subsidies and hybrid work opportunities. The company's commitment to supporting families underscores its dedication to employee well-being and work-life balance.

news.headline: Inflation in Switzerland remains at a four-year low in March, defying expectations.
China Foreign Ministry, on US reciprocal tariffs: We urge the US to correct its wrongdoing
China Foreign Ministry, on US reciprocal tariffs: under the pretext of reciprocal tariffs, the us has imposed additional tariffs on China and other countries.
China Foreign Ministry, on US reciprocal tariffs: That severely violates Wto rules and harms a rules-based international trading regime
Experian upgrades Aperture Data Studio with new features for data quality & governance. Helps businesses make data-driven decisions.
news.summary: In London today, Experian has introduced a series of substantial improvements to its primary data quality and governance tool, Aperture Data Studio. This comprehensive data intelligence platform merges data quality and governance features to assist companies in implementing data-informed decision-making processes, guaranteeing the suitability of their data, enhancing customer satisfaction and operational effectiveness, and handling risks efficiently. The updated Aperture Data Studio offers significant enhancements for users.

news.headline: Thoughtworks names Kaushik Sarkar as Regional Managing Director for Europe, Middle East, India.
news.summary: A global technology consultancy, Thoughtworks, has appointed Kaushik Sarkar as the new Regional Managing Director for its Europe, Middle East, and India (EMEI) division. This region presents a diverse landscape with different regulatory frameworks, cultural characteristics, and varying digital maturity levels. Thoughtworks aims to navigate these complexities with its focus on AI-first approaches, agility, and human-centered design principles.

news.headline: ECB's Stournaras: US tariffs are no obstacle to April rate cut
ECB's Stournaras: US tariffs are to hit growth; inflation path is unchanged
Traders boost ECB easing bets, seeing 90% chance of April rate cut
Discover ClampTite Tools: innovative clamps for robust repairs. Tune in to "Under the Hood" on All Access with Andy Garcia.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on April 3, 2025, ClampTite Tools are being highlighted for their superior strength and adaptability compared to traditional clamps. Viewers can learn more about these tools on an upcoming episode of All Access with Andy Garcia called "Under the Hood", where they will see how these tools empower users to handle any repair task with confidence.

news.headline: Transnovo reveals new Switch 2 accessories, celebrates with 20 Switch 2 giveaway amid 2025 Nintendo announcement.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in SHENZHEN, China, Transnovo excitingly launched its initial batch of accessories for the Nintendo Switch 2, coinciding with the official announcement of the console. The new accessories are intended to elevate the gaming experience for the upcoming wave of gamers. This marks a significant step for Transnovo, as they aim to capitalize on the anticipated success of the Nintendo Switch 2.

news.headline: JMGO releases affordable N1S 4K triple laser projector in China, making premium 4K projection accessible; launched on April 3, 2025.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on April 3, 2025, JMGO, a leading innovator in smart projector technology, unveiled the N1S 4K projector. This groundbreaking 4K triple laser projector breaks the traditional cost barrier, offering top-tier 4K projection at an affordable price point. With its cutting-edge features and superior quality, the N1S 4K is set to make high-quality 4K projection accessible to a wider audience.

news.headline: Calastone launches Tokenised Distribution Solution, enabling asset managers to tokenise any fund on their network.
news.summary: In London on April 3, 2025, Calastone, the world's largest global funds network, introduced Calastone Tokenised Distribution. This innovative solution enables asset managers to tokenize any fund within Calastone's network for seamless distribution. The launch signifies a major step forward in the industry, offering new opportunities for asset managers to efficiently distribute funds.

news.headline: Truecaller hits 450M monthly active users milestone, a growth indicator of global reach and popularity.
news.summary: On April 1st, 2025, Truecaller, a top global platform for contact verification and blocking spam calls, achieved a significant milestone as its monthly active user base crossed 450 million. The platform's user numbers continue to rise steadily, solidifying its position in the market as a go-to solution for tackling unwanted communications.

news.headline: Tashkent International Investment Forum aims to boost FDI in Uzbekistan as economy grows by 6%, $90B investments received.
news.summary: Uzbekistan's economy saw significant growth in 2023, nearly doubling with a 6% increase in GDP. The country also managed to attract over $90 billion in foreign investments. As a result of this success, the upcoming Trade and Investment International Forum (TIIF) in 2024 is expected to facilitate more deals and investments. Taking place in TASHKENT, Uzbekistan, the event will be hosted by the Ministry of Investment, Industry, and Trade on April 3, 2025.

news.headline: Riyadh Air partners with Viasat for fast, free streaming on Boeing 787 Dreamliner, enhancing onboard experience.
news.summary: Riyadh Air has announced a partnership with Viasat to enhance its onboard connectivity strategy. This collaboration will integrate Viasat's advanced connectivity solution with Riyadh Air's digital onboard approach. The partnership aims to significantly improve the in-flight experience for passengers by offering faster and more reliable internet access. This move is expected to increase customer satisfaction and loyalty. The specific financial terms of the partnership have not been disclosed.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest - JPY, CHF, EUR, GBP, CAD, NZD, AUD, USD - Weakest
Local government borrows EUR 25 million through MTN programme for financing purposes.
Firms are investing heavily in AI and digital assets, with 80% making significant investments; 50% expect adoption in capital markets to increase significantly.
news.summary: Effective data harmonization is crucial for the successful integration of AI and digital assets, as 80% of companies are projected to allocate a substantial amount of resources towards AI initiatives this year. Additionally, half of corporate executives anticipate a substantial uptake of digital assets and ledger technology in the capital markets sector in the near future.

news.headline: Autoliv signs deals with Alight and Eurowind Energy to meet climate targets, secure renewable energy.
news.summary: Autoliv, Inc. (NYSE: ALV) (SSE: ALIVsdb) announced on April 3, 2025, in Stockholm, that it is entering into two Virtual Power Purchase Agreements with renewable electricity producers Alight and Eurowind Energy. These agreements are crucial for Autoliv in securing a stable and cost-effective energy supply.

news.headline: Hexagon AB appoints Andreas Renulf as President of Manufacturing Intelligence division effective May 1, 2025; will report to Norbert Hanke.
news.summary: Hexagon AB declared on April 3, 2025, the selection of Andreas Renulf as the new President of its Manufacturing Intelligence division, scheduled to begin on May 1, 2025. Andreas will directly report to Norbert Hanke, who is the current interim President and CEO of Hexagon. This shift in leadership comes amid changes within the company, with Andreas slated to take over responsibilities from the current President, Josh Weiss.

news.headline: China's Immigration Service Hotline 12367 releases a new public welfare video offering 24/7 multilingual services.
news.summary: In Beijing on April 3, 2025, the China Immigration Service Hotline 12367 announced the release of a new public welfare video titled "Connect the World Closer, Expand Dreams Wider" on April 2, 2025. The hotline platform offers round-the-clock multilingual assistance to users. The video aims to promote the services provided by the hotline, which has been established to assist individuals with immigration-related inquiries.

news.headline: IRBM adds Functional Genomics Platform to boost drug discovery, aims to de-risk target validation in early stages.
news.summary: IRBM, a Contract Research Organization focused on preclinical drug discovery, has launched a Functional Genomics Platform in Rome on April 3, 2025, to enhance target validation. This platform utilizes data-driven genomic insights to de-risk the process. Through this initiative, IRBM aims to improve the efficiency of target validation with a focus on genetic targets. This move is expected to significantly boost the company's capabilities in this area and potentially lead to more successful drug development endeavors.

news.headline: Researchers at Kanazawa University captured DNA folding in sperm cells for first time using atomic force microscopy.
news.summary: In Kanazawa, Japan, on April 3, 2025, a team of researchers at the Nano Life Science Institute (WPI-NanoLSI) at Kanazawa University, along with their colleagues, made a significant advancement in comprehending sperm DNA packaging. Through the utilization of high-speed atomic force microscopy (HS-AFM), they were able to observe the real-time processes involved...

news.headline: Valmet to upgrade Grasim Industries Limited's plants in India, including new bleach plant at Karnataka site.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Valmet Oyj announced that they will be reconstructing Grasim Industries Limited's brown stock washing and evaporation plant in Karnataka, India. Additionally, they will be supplying a new bleach plant at the Harihar Kumarapatnam site. The project aims to enhance the facilities at the site to improve efficiency and productivity. This endeavor signifies a significant investment in the infrastructure, with an anticipated completion by the end of 2026. The reconstruction and installation of the new plant is part of Valmet's commitment to providing advanced technological solutions to their partners in the industry.

news.headline: Turkish CPI YoY Actual 38.10% (Forecast 38.7%, Previous 39.05%)
